revision.comment: [[Template:EstcatContinent]] now needs no parameters. It creates poartl links where appropriate., replaced: {{EstcatContinent|164|1|Asia}} → {{EstcatContinent}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Text replacement - "[[Category:Supercategory 2]]" to ""
Removing from [[Category:Refreshing categories falsely categorized as uncategorized]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (2 members)
Bot: remove self-membership
Bot: tag as Tier 0 category
Bot: confirm enwiki category & retag
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "↵↵" to " "
Text replacement - "[[Category:confirmed enwiki categories]]" to "[[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[category:confirmed enwiki categories]]"
Bot: tidy cats/interwikis, add JA text & EN link
revision.text: {{EstcatContinent}} en:1641 establishments in Asia]] {{draft categories| }} [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[en:Category:1641 establishments in Asia]] [[Category:Categories with 2 members]] [[category:confirmed enwiki categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
